hero.title: Write Once.
hero.subtitle: Stop rewriting your content for every platform. PostForge uses AI to transform your blog posts, articles, and notes into Twitter threads, LinkedIn posts, newsletters, and more — in seconds.
hero.creditNote: No credit card required • Free tier: 3 transformations/mo

demo.title: Try It Now
demo.placeholder: Paste a URL or article text here...

features.title: One Input, Infinite Outputs
features.subtitle: PostForge intelligently adapts your content for every platform's unique format and audience.

featureCards.title: Twitter Threads
featureCards.desc: Turn any article into a compelling Twitter thread with hooks, key points, and CTAs.

featureCards.title: LinkedIn Posts
featureCards.desc: Professional long-form posts optimized for LinkedIn engagement and reach.

featureCards.title: Newsletter Summaries
featureCards.desc: Email-friendly digests that capture the essence of your content.

featureCards.title: Instagram Captions
featureCards.desc: Short, engaging captions with hashtag optimization for maximum reach.

featureCards.title: SEO Metadata
featureCards.desc: Auto-generated title tags, meta descriptions, and keywords for your blog.

featureCards.title: Brand Voice
featureCards.desc: AI learns your tone and style — consistent output across all platforms.
